name: MD FERDOUSE HOSSAIN BHUIYA
summary: Electrical Engineer with 15+ years of experience in power distribution, overhead line projects, substation operations, and industrial electrical systems. Strong background in AutoCAD, MAXIMO, GIS, preventive maintenance, and HSE compliance. Skilled in Python, SQL, Power BI, and predictive analytics for engineering decision support. Currently pursuing M.S. in Electrical Engineering at FAU (Expected 2028).

experience.title: Electrical Engineer
bullets: Ensured reliable 33/11/0.415 kV distribution network operations.
Led overhead line and substation maintenance with strong HSE compliance.
Used MAXIMO, GIS, and AutoCAD for asset tracking and planning.
Applied analytics for outage trends and preventive maintenance optimization.

experience.title: Electrical Engineer
bullets: Installed 33/11 kV overhead lines and 11 kV underground cables.
Ensured compliance with electrical and safety standards.

experience.title: Executive Engineer (Electrical)
bullets: Delivered training in Electrical & Electronic Technology.
Performed diagnostics and system performance analysis.
Created AutoCAD schematics and maintained equipment records.

experience.title: Teacher Assistant – TIESE
bullets: Support instructional delivery and digital learning tools.
Build dashboards for student performance tracking.

publications.title: High Impedance Fault Detection in 11 kV Overhead Line with Discrete Wavelet Transform and Independent Component Analysis
